What I Do
Core Services

Whether you need a dedicated personal assistant or specialized remote support, I bring reliability and attention to detail across five core areas.

Admin Support

From managing your calendar and inbox to data entry, research, and document preparation — I keep your operations running smoothly behind the scenes. As a personal VA, I also handle day-to-day tasks that free up your time for what truly matters.

📞 Cold Calling Script
Real Estate Lead Outreach Script
Cold Calling Script
Real Estate Lead Outreach — Discovery Call
Opening
"Hi, may I speak with [Prospect Name]? Hi [Name], this is Kyla calling on behalf of [Agent/Company Name]. I hope I'm not catching you at a bad time — do you have just two minutes?"
⏸ Wait for response. If they say yes, continue. If no, ask: "When would be a better time to call back?"
Purpose
"Great! The reason for my call is that we noticed you've been looking at properties in [Area/Location], and I wanted to reach out personally to see if we could help. We're working with some great listings right now that match what you might be looking for."
Discovery Questions
• "Are you currently renting or do you own a home?"
• "Are you looking to buy, sell, or both?"
• "Do you have a specific timeline in mind — are you looking to move within the next 30, 60, or 90 days?"
• "Have you already spoken with a real estate agent, or is this your first time exploring your options?"
⏸ Listen carefully and take notes. Acknowledge their answers before moving forward.
Pitch & Value
"Based on what you've shared, I think [Agent Name] would be a great fit to help you. They specialize in [Area] and have helped [X] families find their perfect home this year. The best part — the consultation is completely free and there's no obligation."
Appointment Setting
"I'd love to schedule a quick 20-minute call between you and [Agent Name] so they can walk you through your options. I have availability on [Day] at [Time] or [Day] at [Time] — which works better for you?"
⏸ Offer two specific time slots. Never ask open-ended "when are you free?" — always give options.
Closing & Confirmation
"Perfect! I've got you down for [Day] at [Time]. I'll send a confirmation to your email at [Email Address] — is that still the best email for you? Great. [Agent Name] will be in touch, and if anything comes up, feel free to reach back out to me. Have a wonderful day, [Name]!"

📧 Follow-up Email Sequence
3-Touch Post-Call Follow-up Emails
Follow-up Email Sequence
3-Touch Post-Call Follow-up — Real Estate
Email 1 Send within 1 hour of call
Subject:
Great speaking with you, [First Name]!
Hi [First Name],

Thank you for taking the time to chat with me today! As promised, I'm following up with a few details about your upcoming consultation with [Agent Name].

📅 Date: [Day], [Date]
🕐 Time: [Time] [Timezone]
📞 They'll call you at: [Phone Number]

If you have any questions before your call or need to reschedule, please don't hesitate to reach out to me directly.

Looking forward to helping you find your perfect home!

Warm regards,
Kyla Vasquez
Virtual Assistant | [Company Name]
Email 2 Send 24 hours before appointment
Subject:
Reminder: Your consultation is tomorrow, [First Name] 👋
Hi [First Name],

Just a friendly reminder that your consultation with [Agent Name] is scheduled for tomorrow, [Day] at [Time].

To make the most of your call, you might want to have handy:
  • Your preferred areas or neighborhoods
  • Your budget range
  • Any must-haves for your ideal property

[Agent Name] is looking forward to speaking with you! If anything has changed, please let me know as soon as possible.

See you tomorrow!

Kyla Vasquez
Virtual Assistant | [Company Name]
Email 3 Send 1 day after — if no response or no-show
Subject:
We missed you — let's find a new time, [First Name]
Hi [First Name],

It looks like we weren't able to connect at your scheduled time — no worries at all! I know how busy life can get.

I'd love to set up a new time for you to speak with [Agent Name] at your convenience. We have availability on:
  • [Option 1 — Day & Time]
  • [Option 2 — Day & Time]

Just reply to this email or give me a call at [Phone Number] and I'll get you rescheduled right away.

Hope to hear from you soon!

Kyla Vasquez
Virtual Assistant | [Company Name]

📄 Email Templates
Professional Customer Email Templates

Two ready-to-use, professionally written email templates demonstrating how I handle customer follow-ups and complaints — with a formal tone, clear structure, and a focus on resolution and retention.

Email Template 01
Follow-up / Check-in Email
From: Kyla Vasquez <[email protected]> To: [Customer Name] <[[email protected]]> Subject: Following Up — How Can We Help You, [First Name]?

Dear [First Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out on behalf of [Company Name] to follow up on your recent interaction with us on [Date/Reference]. We wanted to take a moment to check in and ensure that everything has been resolved to your satisfaction.

If you have any remaining concerns, questions, or feedback regarding your experience, please do not hesitate to reply to this email or reach out to us directly. We are more than happy to assist you further.

Your satisfaction is our priority, and we greatly value the trust you have placed in [Company Name]. We look forward to continuing to serve you.

Thank you for your time, [First Name]. We appreciate you and hope to hear from you soon.

Warm regards,

Kyla Justine Vasquez

Email Support Specialist | [Company Name]

📧 [email protected]  |  💬 Available Mon–Fri, 9AM–6PM

Follow-up Customer Retention Post-interaction
Email Template 02
Complaint Handling Email
From: Kyla Vasquez <[email protected]> To: [Customer Name] <[[email protected]]> Subject: We Hear You — Regarding Your Recent Experience with [Company Name]

Dear [First Name],

Thank you for taking the time to bring this matter to our attention. I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and frustration you experienced. Please know that your concern has been received and is being taken very seriously by our team.

After reviewing your case — [Brief description of the issue, e.g., "the delayed delivery of your order #12345"] — I want to assure you that this is not the standard of service we hold ourselves to at [Company Name].

Here is what we are doing to resolve this for you:

✅  [Action Step 1] — e.g., Your order has been escalated and is now being prioritized.

✅  [Action Step 2] — e.g., A full investigation has been initiated into what caused the delay.

✅  [Resolution/Goodwill Gesture] — e.g., As a courtesy, we would like to offer you [discount/refund/replacement].

We expect this to be fully resolved by [Date/Timeframe]. I will personally follow up with you on that date to confirm everything has been addressed.

Once again, I sincerely apologize for the trouble this has caused. We deeply value your relationship with [Company Name] and are committed to making this right.

Please feel free to reply to this email directly if you have any additional questions or concerns. I am here to help.

With sincere apologies and regards,

Kyla Justine Vasquez

Email Support Specialist | [Company Name]

📧 [email protected]  |  💬 Available Mon–Fri, 9AM–6PM

I made sure the layout stays clean and engaging so readers actually enjoy learning about their gut health.

Hi, I'm Kyla Justine

I'm a Virtual and Personal Assistant based in Butuan City, Caraga, Philippines. I work with business owners, entrepreneurs, and busy professionals who need a reliable, all-around assistant they can actually count on.

My experience spans admin support, social media management, appointment setting, email handling, and graphic design — and I bring the same level of care and attention whether I'm managing a complex calendar, designing graphics for a campaign, or responding to customer emails on your behalf.

I'm tech-savvy, self-managed, and thrive in fast-paced remote environments. I don't just complete tasks — I anticipate needs, communicate proactively, and treat your business like it's my own.

Detail-orientedFast learnerProactiveRemote-readyEnglish fluent
